title: Unification Wars (Galactic Republic)
content:

|prev=[[Rakatan Civil War]]<ref name="Rakata">According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the [[Rakatan Civil War]] ended in c. [[25,200 BBY]]. Per {{CSWECite|III|280|Unification Wars (I)}}, the Unification Wars led to the formation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], which occurred in [[25,053 BBY]] according to ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''. The Unification Wars therefore took place around that time, which is later than the Rakatan Civil War.</ref>
|conc=
|next=*[[First Great Schism]]<ref name="Schism">The [[First Great Schism]] and [[The Devouring]] occurred in c. [[24,500 BBY]], according to [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] and the {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}}, respectively. Per {{CSWECite|III|280|Unification Wars (I)}}, the creation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]—which occurred in [[25,053 BBY]] according to ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''—followed the Unification Wars. The Wars thus transpired around that time, which is earlier than the First Great Schism and The Devouring.</ref>

Per {{CSWECite|III|280|Unification Wars (I)}}, the Unification Wars led to the founding of the Republic, so the Wars must have occurred by 25,053 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref>

The '''Unification Wars''' were a conflict that led to [[Core Founder/Legends|several]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] uniting to [[Galactic Constitution/Legends|form]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The wars arose by [[25,053 BBY]], shortly after the [[Rakatan Civil War|collapse]] of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], which had previously [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] much of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The notorious [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zakrinand Minus]] fought for one of the warring sides. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] fought during the wars and were victorious, joining the nascent Republic shortly thereafter as peacekeepers.

==Prelude==
[[File:Rakata.jpg|thumb|right|165px|The Rakatan Infinite Empire dominated the galaxy in the centuries preceding the Unification Wars.]]
[[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] before the Unification Wars,<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the height of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] to [[30,000 BBY]]. The Unification Wars led to the formation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] per {{CSWECite|III|280|Unification Wars (I)}}. The Republic's formation occurred in [[25,053 BBY]] according to the ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''. The Wars thus occurred around that [[Time/Legends|time]], which is several [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] after the height of the Infinite Empire.</ref> the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] emerged as the dominant power in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] many [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] using their [[Force-drive|Force-powered hyperdrives]], until eventually a [[Rakatan plague|plague]] ravaged their empire. The survivors were stripped of their [[Force-sensitive/Legends|connection]] to the Force, and could do nothing to prevent the slave [[Rakatan Civil War|uprising]] that followed. The collapse of the Infinite Empire paved the way for other powers to develop, such as the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] and [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]], who reverse-engineered the Rakatan hyperdrive and started to [[Scout/Legends|explore]] the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==The wars==
Before a clear new dominant power in the galaxy could be established again, the Unification Wars erupted<ref name="UW" /> at some point by [[25,053 BBY]].<ref name="SWTOR" /> The infamous [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zakrinand Minus]] commanded forces on one of the warring sides of the conflict and came to be regarded as a near-invincible leader.<ref name="DOAE2">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-2|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> The Force-sensitive [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] partook in the conflict, eventually emerging victorious from the wars<ref name="UW" /> by 25,053 BBY.<ref name="SWTOR" /> Some later [[Historian/Legends|historians]] believed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] clashed with what the former considered to be forces of "evil" during the conflict, and that they were aided by the mystic [[Order of Dai Bendu|Bendu monks]] in that fight.<ref name="UW" />

==Aftermath==
[[File:Galactic_Senate.png|thumb|left|230px|The Galactic Republic stood for twenty-five thousand years following the Unification Wars.]]
Following the wars,<ref name="UW" /> several planets from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] combined, and the [[Galactic Constitution/Legends|constitution]] for a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was ratified. Among the prominent [[Core Founder/Legends|founders]] of this thriving [[Democracy/Legends|democracy]] were planets such as [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Although initially wary of the Republic, the Jedi joined it<ref name="NEC" /> a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] after the wars' end,<ref name="Jedi">{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant|int=Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant}} provides 21,300 BTC as the date when the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] began in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], which is 1,347 BTC in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''{{'s}} ''[[Galactic Timeline]]'', so the difference between the [[Galactic Standard Calendar|calendar]] based on the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] (BBY) and the calendar based on the [[Treaty of Coruscant]] (BTC) is 3,653 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. This allows to place the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] joining the Republic in [[24,953 BBY]].</ref> taking on the role of peacekeepers.<ref name="NEC" /> The [[Republic crest/Legends|emblem]] brandished by the Bendu during the conflict<ref name="Bendu">{{CSWECite|I|70|Bendu monks}}</ref> would be adopted as the official symbol of the Galactic Republic.<ref name="GR">{{CSWECite|I|311|galactic roundel}}</ref> The Republic would survive for twenty-five thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]], enduring in spite of the many conflicts that sought to engulf it.<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Unification Wars were first referenced in the [[2005]] guide [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections|''Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections'']], which claimed that the conflict led to the Republic's founding.<ref name="ICS">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> However, the Unification Wars have been ignored by most subsequent sources, which largely indicate that the Republic was founded peacefully.<ref name="NEC" /><ref name="Atlas" /><ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
